name: Ware Living Room Series Ferret Cage
description: Enjoy comfort, safety and convenient cleaning with the Ware Living Room Series Ferret Cage. This cozy cage comes complete with shelves, ramps, a bowl and other accessories to help your fuzzy friend feel right at home. It’s made with durable plastic, powder-coated metal and chew-proof welded steel. Narrow 1-inch bar spacing helps prevent your adventurous fellow from sneaking out. Plus, the full size slide-out pan makes cleanups a breeze!
